Они сбивали с толку хищников ловушками и лабиринтами тоннелей. Они также переняли магию у таких богов, как Гарл Златоблеск, Баэрван Дикий Странник и Баравар Тенеплащ, что являлись к ним переодетыми. Эта магия со временем породила родословные лесных и скальных гномов.
Gnome._fluffText.0.entries.0.entries.1: Гномы — миниатюрный народ с большими глазами и заострёнными ушами, живущий около 425 лет. Многим гномам нравится ощущение крыши над головой, даже если этой «крышей» оказывается всего лишь шляпа.
Gnome.entries.0.entries.0: У вас есть {@sense Darkvision|XPHB|Тёмное зрение} дальностью 60 футов.
Gnome.entries.0.name: Тёмное зрение
Gnome.entries.1.entries.0: Вы совершаете с {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB|Преимуществом} спасброски Интеллекта, Мудрости и Харизмы.
Gnome.entries.1.name: Гномья хитрость
Gnome.entries.2.entries.0: Вы принадлежите к родословной, что дарует вам сверхъестественные способности. Выберите один из следующих вариантов; какой бы вы ни выбрали, вашей заклинательной характеристикой для заклинаний, накладываемых этой особенностью, является Интеллект, Мудрость или Харизма (выберите характеристику при выборе родословной):
Gnome.entries.2.entries.1.items.0.entrie: Вы знаете заговор {@spell Minor Illusion|XPHB|Малая иллюзия}. Кроме того, у вас всегда подготовлено заклинание {@spell Speak with Animals|XPHB|Разговор с животными}. Вы можете накладывать его без ячейки заклинаний количество раз, равное вашему {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Бонусу владения}, и восстанавливаете все потраченные использования, когда завершаете {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Долгий отдых}. Вы также можете использовать любые свои ячейки заклинаний, чтобы наложить это заклинание.
Gnome.entries.2.entries.1.items.0.name: Лесной гном
Gnome.entries.2.entries.1.items.1.entrie: Вы знаете заговоры {@spell Mending|XPHB|Починка} и {@spell Prestidigitation|XPHB|Фокусы}. Кроме того, вы можете потратить 10 минут на накладывание {@spell Prestidigitation|XPHB|Фокусов}, чтобы создать Крошечное часовое устройство (КД 5, 1 хит) — например, игрушку, средство для розжига или музыкальную шкатулку. Создавая устройство, вы определяете его функцию, выбрав один эффект из {@spell Prestidigitation|XPHB|Фокусов}; устройство производит этот эффект всякий раз, когда вы или другое существо тратите {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB|Бонусное действие}, чтобы активировать его прикосновением. Если у выбранного эффекта есть варианты внутри, вы выбираете один из них для устройства при его создании. Например, если вы выбираете эффект заклинания «зажечь-погасить», вы определяете, зажигает устройство огонь или гасит его; и то и другое оно делать не может. У вас может одновременно существовать до трёх таких устройств, и каждое разваливается через 8 часов после создания или когда вы разбираете его прикосновением действием {@action Utilize|XPHB|Применение}.
Gnome.entries.2.entries.1.items.1.name: Скальный гном
Gnome.entries.2.name: Гномья родословная
Gnome.name: Гном
Goblin._fluffText.0: Подземный народ, гоблины встречаются в каждом уголке мультивселенной, нередко бок о бок со своими сородичами багбирами и хобгоблинами. Задолго до того, как их покорил бог Маглубиет, ранние гоблины служили при дворе Королевы Воздуха и Тьмы, одной из архифей Страны Фей. Гоблины процветали в её опасных владениях благодаря особому дару от неё — сверхъестественному чутью находить слабые места у врагов крупнее себя и выбираться из неприятностей. Гоблины принесли этот дар фей с собой в миры по всему Материальному Плану, даже если не помнят тот мир фей, в котором обитали до возвышения Маглубиета. Ныне многие гоблины следуют собственной судьбе, ускользая от козней как архифей, так и богов.
Goblin.entries.0.entries.0: Вы — гуманоид. Вы также считаетесь гоблиноидом для любого требования или эффекта, для которого нужно быть гоблиноидом.
Goblin.entries.0.name: Тип существа
Goblin.entries.1.entries.0: Вы можете видеть в тусклом свете в пределах 60 футов от вас, как если бы это был яркий свет, и в темноте — как если бы это был тусклый свет. В этой темноте вы различаете цвета лишь как оттенки серого.
Goblin.entries.1.name: Тёмное зрение
Goblin.entries.2.entries.0: Вы совершаете с преимуществом спасброски, которые делаете, чтобы избежать состояния {@condition charmed|XPHB|Очарованный} или прекратить его действие на себе.
Goblin.entries.2.name: Наследие фей
Goblin.entries.3.entries.0: Когда вы наносите урон существу атакой или заклинанием, а размер этого существа больше вашего, вы можете заставить атаку или заклинание нанести этому существу дополнительный урон. Дополнительный урон равен вашему бонусу владения.
Goblin.entries.3.entries.1: Вы можете использовать эту особенность количество раз, равное вашему бонусу владения, восстанавливая все потраченные использования по завершении долгого отдыха, и можете использовать её не более одного раза за ход.
Goblin.entries.3.name: Ярость малышей
Goblin.entries.4.entries.0: В каждый свой ход вы можете бонусным действием совершать действие {@action Disengage|XPHB|Отход} или {@action Hide|XPHB|Затаивание}.
Goblin.entries.4.name: Проворное отступление
Goblin.entries.5.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Goblin.entries.5.name: Языки
Goblin.name: Гоблин
Goliath._fluffText.0.entries.0.entries.0: Возвышаясь над большинством народов, голиафы — дальние потомки великанов. Каждый голиаф несёт милости первых великанов — милости, что проявляются в различных сверхъестественных дарах, включая способность быстро расти и на время приближаться к росту своих исполинских сородичей.
Goliath._fluffText.0.entries.0.entries.1: Голиафы обладают физическими чертами, что напоминают великанов в их родовых линиях. Например, одни голиафы похожи на каменных великанов, тогда как другие напоминают огненных великанов. Какими бы великанами ни были их родичи, голиафы проложили собственный путь в мультивселенной — не обременённые междоусобными распрями, что веками раздирали род великанов, — и стремятся к высотам, превосходящим достигнутые их предками.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.0: Вы происходите от Великанов. Выберите одно из следующих преимуществ — сверхъестественный дар вашего происхождения; вы можете использовать выбранное преимущество количество раз, равное вашему {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Бонусу владения}, и восстанавливаете все потраченные использования, когда завершаете {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Долгий отдых}:
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.0.entr: {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB|Бонусным действием} вы магически телепортируетесь на расстояние до 30 футов в свободное пространство, которое видите.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.0.name: Прыжок облака (Облачный великан)
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.1.entr: Когда вы попадаете по цели броском атаки и наносите ей урон, вы также можете нанести этой цели урон Огнём {@damage 1d10}.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.1.name: Ожог огня (Огненный великан)
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.2.entr: Когда вы попадаете по цели броском атаки и наносите ей урон, вы также можете нанести этой цели урон Холодом {@damage 1d6} и снизить её {@variantrule Speed|XPHB|Скорость} на 10 футов до начала вашего следующего хода.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.2.name: Озноб мороза (Ледяной великан)
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.3.entr: Когда вы попадаете по Большому или меньшему существу броском атаки и наносите ему урон, вы можете наложить на эту цель состояние {@condition Prone|XPHB|Лежащий}.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.3.name: Опрокидывание холма (Холмовой великан)
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.4.entr: Когда вы получаете урон, вы можете {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Реакцией} бросить {@dice 1d12}. Прибавьте к выпавшему числу ваш модификатор Телосложения и уменьшите урон на эту сумму.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.4.name: Стойкость камня (Каменный великан)
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.5.entr: Когда вы получаете урон от существа в пределах 60 футов от вас, вы можете {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Реакцией} нанести этому существу урон Звуком {@damage 1d8}.
Goliath.entries.0.entries.1.items.5.name: Гром бури (Грозовой великан)
Goliath.entries.0.name: Происхождение от великанов
Goliath.entries.1.entries.0: Начиная с 5-го уровня персонажа, вы можете {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB|Бонусным действием} изменить свой размер на Большой, если находитесь в достаточно просторном месте. Это превращение длится 10 минут или пока вы его не завершите (действий не требуется). На это время вы получаете {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB|Преимущество} на проверки Силы, а ваша {@variantrule Speed|XPHB|Скорость} увеличивается на 10 футов. Использовав эту особенность, вы не можете применить её снова, пока не завершите {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Долгий отдых}.
Goliath.entries.1.name: Крупный облик
Goliath.entries.2.entries.0: Вы совершаете с {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB|Преимуществом} любую проверку характеристики, которую делаете, чтобы прекратить состояние {@condition Grappled|XPHB|Захваченный}. Вы также считаетесь на один размер больше при определении вашей грузоподъёмности.
Goliath.entries.2.name: Мощное телосложение
Goliath.name: Голиаф
Grudgel._fluffText.0: Легенды Этариса повествуют об эпохе орков. Это древнее наследие уходит корнями на Север Этариса, откуда, как утверждает история, они расселились, чтобы терроризировать другие культуры. Орки, как стало пониматься это слово, были грозными воинами с нескончаемой жаждой битвы. Однако сказания о том, что их армии едва не покорили весь Этарис, почти наверняка пропаганда напуганных чужих культур.
Grudgel._fluffText.1: Те же легенды рассказывают, как орки массово покинули свои земли — не из-за вражеских вторжений или стихийного бедствия, а из-за некоего таинственного зова их предков отплыть на запад через море. Хотя считается, что орки действительно бежали из Этариса на огромном флоте, а их наследие век спустя воззвало к Торгарду ав Холгару, кажется неправдоподобным, что целое наследие могло попросту исчезнуть за морем. Воистину, правда сложнее, чем способны поведать любые из этих старых сказаний.
Grudgel._fluffText.2: Потомки орков называют себя груджелами. Их несходство с ужасающими легендами об их предках заставляет несведущих полагать, будто орки и груджелы — разные народы. Но на деле их разделяет лишь время и изменившаяся культура.
Grudgel._fluffText.3: Груджелы — внушительный народ, чьё телесное присутствие не умалилось со времён легенд об орочьих воинах. И всё же даже там, где они наиболее многочисленны — среди Валиканских кланов, — груджелы не более и не менее склонны к битве или пути воина, чем любой другой народ. Груджелы также талантливые ремесленники, странники, ткачи магии и звездочёты. Лишь они владеют секретами ковки стриллума — странного вещества, что возникает, когда звёздный свет затвердевает в стекло. Груджелы трудолюбивы, миролюбивы среди друзей и умеют сохранять спокойствие под давлением. Но они более чем способны защитить себя от угроз дикой природы и от тех, кто ищет драки.
Grudgel._fluffText.4: За пределами Севера груджелы в Этарисе достаточно редки, чтобы люди скорее наслушались о них пугающих слухов, чем встретили хоть одного. И хотя груджел, работающий телохранителем или наёмником, может пользоваться такими слухами, единственное, что как будто объединяет всех груджелов, — это общее нежелание обсуждать или слушать древние легенды об орках. Но проистекает ли это из желания отстраниться от жестокого прошлого их сородичей или из некоего тайного знания о том, почему орки исчезли из Этариса, — ведомо лишь им.
Grudgel._fluffText.5.entries.0: Жуткие наследия Grim Hollow охватывают самых разных существ, сформированных магическим умыслом, противоестественной силой или прикосновением древних проклятий. Почти неизменно представители этих наследий обречены в одиночку прокладывать свой путь по неспокойному и опасному миру.
Grudgel._fluffText.5.name: Редкие наследия
Grudgel.entries.0.items.0.entries.0: Груджелы достигают взрослости примерно к 16 годам и могут дожить до своего седьмого десятка лет и дольше.
Grudgel.entries.0.items.0.name: Возраст:
Grudgel.entries.1.entries.0: Многих груджелов формирует жизнь странников и давнее увлечение ремеслом и магией.
Grudgel.entries.1.entries.1.name: Боевые черты:
Grudgel.entries.1.entries.2.name: Исследовательские черты:
Grudgel.entries.1.entries.3.name: Ролевые черты:
Grudgel.entries.1.name: Традиционные черты груджела
Grudgel.entries.2.entries.0.entries.0: Выбор традиционных черт, указанных для вашего наследия, — быстрый и простой способ создать персонажа, который ощущается как надёжный архетип в рамках выбранного наследия. Однако вы можете заменить любую из предложенных традиционных черт наследия на {@filter любую из доступных черт|optionalfeatures|source=GrimHollowPG24|feature type=HT}, собирая персонажа из любых восьми черт. Сюда входит возможность взять традиционные черты, представленные для любого другого наследия, взять одну из своих традиционных черт повторно, чтобы получить её вторичный эффект, или взять любую из множества черт, не входящих в стандартный набор какого-либо наследия.
Grudgel.entries.2.entries.0.name: Выбор черт
Grudgel.name: Груджел
Hadozee._fluffText.0: Прародители хадози были млекопитающими не крупнее домашних кошек. Преследуемые более крупными природными хищниками, они перебрались на деревья и обзавелись крыловидными перепонками, что позволяли им планировать с ветки на ветку.
Hadozee._fluffText.1: Ныне хадози — разумные двуногие существа, жаждущие оставить позади грозных хищников родного мира и исследовать иные миры.
Hadozee._fluffText.2: Помимо того что хадози — прирождённые верхолазы, их ступни столь же ловки, как и руки, вплоть до наличия противопоставленных больших пальцев. Перепонки кожи свободно свисают с их рук и ног. Натянутые туго, эти перепонки позволяют хадози планировать. Хадози закутываются в эти крылья, чтобы согреться.
Hadozee.entries.0.entries.0: Вы Среднего или Маленького размера. Вы выбираете размер при выборе этой расы.
Hadozee.entries.0.name: Размер
Hadozee.entries.1.entries.0: Бонусным действием вы можете использовать свои ступни, чтобы управляться с предметом, открыть или закрыть дверь либо контейнер, а также поднять или положить Крошечный предмет.
Hadozee.entries.1.name: Ловкие ступни
Hadozee.entries.2.entries.0: Когда вы падаете с высоты не менее 10 футов над землёй, вы можете реакцией расправить свои кожные перепонки, чтобы спланировать по горизонтали на число футов, равное вашей скорости ходьбы, и получаете 0 урона от падения. Направление планирования определяете вы.
Hadozee.entries.2.name: Планирование
Hadozee.entries.3.entries.0: Магия, что течёт в ваших жилах, усиливает ваши природные защиты. Когда вы получаете урон, вы можете реакцией бросить {@dice d6}. Прибавьте к выпавшему числу ваш бонус владения и уменьшите получаемый урон на величину, равную этой сумме (минимум 0 урона).
Hadozee.entries.3.entries.1: Вы можете использовать эту особенность количество раз, равное вашему бонусу владения. Вы восстанавливаете все потраченные использования, когда завершаете долгий отдых.
Hadozee.entries.3.name: Уклонение хадози
Hadozee.entries.4.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Hadozee.entries.4.name: Языки
Hadozee.name: Хадози
Объединённые ли под началом могучего колдуна или сошедшиеся в безвыходном противостоянии после лет вражды, племена орков и людей порой заключают союзы, сливая силы в более крупную орду на ужас близлежащим цивилизованным землям. Когда такие союзы скрепляются браками, рождаются полуорки. Некоторые полуорки возвышаются до гордых вождей орочьих племён — человеческая кровь даёт им преимущество над чистокровными орочьими соперниками. Другие отправляются в мир, чтобы доказать свою ценность среди людей и иных цивилизованных рас. Многие из них становятся искателями приключений, обретая величие за свои могучие подвиги и дурную славу за варварские обычаи и дикую ярость.

Сероватая кожа полуорков, покатые лбы, выступающие челюсти, заметные зубы и громоздкое телосложение делают их орочье происхождение очевидным для всех. Полуорки имеют рост от 6 до 7 футов и обычно весят от 180 до 250 фунтов.

Орки считают боевые шрамы знаками гордости, а узорные шрамы — чем-то прекрасным. Иные же шрамы метят орка или полуорка как бывшего раба или опозоренного изгнанника. У любого полуорка, что жил среди орков или рядом с ними, есть шрамы — будь то отметины унижения или гордости, повествующие о былых подвигах и ранах. Такой полуорк, живущий среди людей, может либо с гордостью выставлять эти шрамы напоказ, либо стыдливо скрывать их.

The one-eyed god Gruumsh created the Orcs, and even those orcs who turn away from his worship can't fully escape his influence. The same is true of half orcs, though their human blood moderates the impact of their orcish heritage. Some half-orcs hear the whispers of Gruumsh in their dreams, calling them to unleash the rage that simmers within them. Others feel Gruumsh's exultation when they join in melee combat-and either exult along with him or shiver with fear and loathing. Half-orcs are not evil by nature, but evil does lurk within them, whether they embrace it or rebel against it.

Beyond the rage of Gruumsh, half-orcs feel emotion powerfully. Rage doesn't just quicken their pulse, it makes their bodies burn. An insult stings like acid, and sadness saps their strength. But they laugh loudly and heartily, and simple bodily pleasures-feasting, drinking, wrestling, drumming, and wild dancing-fill their hearts with joy. They tend to be short tempered and sometimes sullen, more inclined to action than contemplation and to fighting than arguing. The most accomplished half-orcs are those with enough self control to get by in a civilized land.

Half-orcs usually have names appropriate to the culture in which they were raised. A half-orc who wants to fit in among humans might trade an orc name for a human name. Some half-orcs with human names decide to adopt a guttural orc name because they think it makes them more intimidating.
Dench, Feng, Gell, Henk, Holg, Imsh, Keth, Krusk, Mhurren, Ront, Shump, Thokk
Baggi, Emen, Engong, Kansif, Myev, Neega, Ovak, Ownka, Shautha, Vola, Volen, Yevelda

Each half-orc finds a way to gain acceptance from those who hate orcs. Some are reserved, trying not to draw attention to themselves. A few demonstrate piety and good-heartedness as publicly as they can (whether or not such demonstrations are genuine). And some simply try to be so tough that others just avoid them.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.0: Эта раса и перечисленные ниже встречаются нечасто. Они есть не в каждом мире D&D, и даже там, где они есть, они менее распространены, чем дварфы, эльфы, полурослики и люди. В космополитичных городах мультивселенной D&D большинство людей едва ли обращают внимание даже на представителей самых экзотических рас. Но небольшие города и деревни, разбросанные по сельской местности, — иное дело. Простой люд не привык видеть представителей этих рас и реагирует соответственно.
Легко принять драконорождённого за чудовище, особенно если его чешуя выдаёт хроматическое происхождение. Однако, пока драконорождённый не начнёт изрыгать пламя и сеять разрушение, люди скорее ответят настороженностью, чем неприкрытым страхом.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.1.name: Драконорождённый
Гномы не выглядят угрозой и быстро обезоруживают подозрения добрым нравом. Простой люд часто любопытствует о гномах, вероятно никогда прежде их не видев, но редко проявляет враждебность или страх.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.2.name: Гном
Хотя многие никогда не видели полуэльфа, почти все знают об их существовании. Появление незнакомого полуэльфа сопровождается сплетнями за его спиной и украдкой брошенными взглядами через общий зал, а не противостоянием или открытым любопытством.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.3.name: Полуэльф
Обычно можно смело предположить, что полуорк воинственен и вспыльчив, поэтому рядом с незнакомым полуорком люди ведут себя осторожно. Торговцы могут украдкой прятать ценные или хрупкие товары, когда входит полуорк, а посетители постепенно покидают таверну, полагая, что вот-вот вспыхнет драка.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.4.name: Полуорк
Полуорков встречают практичной осторожностью, но тифлинги — предмет суеверного страха. Зло их происхождения отчётливо видно в их чертах, и, по мнению большинства, тифлинг вполне может оказаться дьяволом прямиком из Девяти Преисподних. Люди могут осенять себя оберегающими знаками при приближении тифлинга, переходить на другую сторону улицы, чтобы не пройти рядом, или запирать двери лавок прежде, чем тифлинг успеет войти.
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.entries.5.name: Тифлинг
Half-Orc._fluffText.1.name: Необычные расы
Half-Orc.entries.0.entries.0: Half-orcs mature a little faster than humans, reaching adulthood around age 14. They age noticeably faster and rarely live longer than 75 years.
Half-Orc.entries.0.name: Возраст
Half-Orc.entries.1.entries.0: Half-orcs are somewhat larger and bulkier than humans, and they range from 5 to well over 6 feet tall. Your size is Medium.
Half-Orc.entries.1.name: Размер
Half-Orc.entries.2.entries.0: Thanks to your orc blood, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
Half-Orc.entries.2.name: Тёмное зрение
Half-Orc.entries.3.entries.0: You gain proficiency in the {@skill Intimidation} skill.
Half-Orc.entries.3.name: Menacing
Half-Orc.entries.4.entries.0: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.
Half-Orc.entries.4.name: Relentless Endurance
Half-Orc.entries.5.entries.0: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.
Half-Orc.entries.5.name: Savage Attacks
Half-Orc.entries.6.entries.0: You can speak, read, and write Common and Orc. Orc is a harsh, grating language with hard consonants. It has no script of its own but is written in the Dwarvish script.
Half-Orc.entries.6.name: Языки
Half-Orc.name: Полуорк
Halfling (Lotusden)._fluffText.0: Long tied to the natural heart of the Lotusden Greenwood, these halflings have adapted to live synergistically with the chaotic laws of the wilds.
Halfling (Lotusden)._fluffText.1.entries: The comforts of home are the goals of most halflings' lives: a place to settle in peace and quiet, far from marauding monsters and clashing armies; a blazing fire and a generous meal; fine drink and fine conversation. Though some halflings live out their days in remote agricultural communities, others form nomadic bands that travel constantly, lured by the open road and the wide horizon to discover the wonders of new lands and peoples. But even these wanderers love peace, food, hearth, and home, though home might be a wagon jostling along a dirt road or a raft floating downriver.

The diminutive halflings survive in a world full of larger creatures by avoiding notice or, barring that, avoiding offense. Standing about 3 feet tall, they appear relatively harmless and so have managed to survive for centuries in the shadow of empires and on the edges of wars and political strife. They are inclined to be stout, weighing between 40 and 45 pounds.

Halflings' skin ranges from tan to pale with a ruddy cast, and their hair is usually brown or sandy brown and wavy. They have brown or hazel eyes. Halfling men often sport long sideburns, but beards are rare among them and mustaches even more so. They like to wear simple, comfortable, and practical clothes, favoring bright colors.

Halfling practicality extends beyond their clothing. They're concerned with basic needs and simple pleasures and have little use for ostentation. Even the wealthiest of halflings keep their treasures locked in a cellar rather than on display for all to see. They have a knack for finding the most straightforward solution to a problem, and have little patience for dithering.
Small and Practical

Halflings are an affable and cheerful people. They cherish the bonds of family and friendship as well as the comforts of hearth and home, harboring few dreams of gold or glory. Even adventurers among them usually venture into the world for reasons of community, friendship, wanderlust, or curiosity. They love discovering new things, even simple things, such as an exotic food or an unfamiliar style of clothing.
Halflings are easily moved to pity and hate to see any living thing suffer. They are generous, happily sharing what they have even in lean times.
Kind and Curious

Halflings are adept at fitting into a community of humans, dwarves, or elves, making themselves valuable and welcome. The combination of their inherent stealth and their unassuming nature helps halflings to avoid unwanted attention.

Halflings work readily with others, and they are loyal to their friends, whether halfling or otherwise. They can display remarkable ferocity when their friends, families, or communities are threatened.
Blend into the Crowd

Most halflings live in small, peaceful communities with large farms and well-kept groves. They rarely build kingdoms of their own or even hold much land beyond their quiet shires. They typically don't recognize any sort of halfling nobility or royalty, instead looking to family elders to guide them. Families preserve their traditional ways despite the rise and fall of empires.

Many halflings live among other races, where the halflings' hard work and loyal outlook offer them abundant rewards and creature comforts. Some halfling communities travel as a way of life, driving wagons or guiding boats from place to place and maintaining no permanent home.
Pastoral Pleasantries
Halfling try to get along with everyone else and are loath to make sweeping generalizations-especially negative ones.
"Dwarves make loyal friends, and you can count on them to keep their word. But would it hurt them to smile once in a while?"
Дварфы

"They're so beautiful! Their faces, their music, their grace and all. It's like they stepped out of a wonderful dream. But there's no telling what's going on behind their smiling faces-surely more than they ever let on."
Elves

"Humans are a lot like us, really. At least some of them are. Step out of the castles and keeps, go talk to the farmers and herders and you'll find good, solid folk. Not that there's anything wrong with the barons and soldiers - you have to admire their conviction. And by protecting their own lands, they protect us as well."
Люди
Affable and Positive

Halflings usually set out on the adventurer's path to defend their communities, support their friends, or explore a wide and wonder-filled world. For them, adventuring is less a career than an opportunity or sometimes a necessity.
Exploring Opportunities
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.0.entries.0: A halfling reaches adulthood at the age of 20 and generally lives into the middle of his or her second century.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.0.name: Возраст
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.1.entries.0: Halflings average about 3 feet tall and weigh about 40 pounds. Your size is Small.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.1.name: Размер
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.2.entries.0: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.2.name: Lucky
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.3.entries.0: You have advantage on saving throws against being {@condition frightened}.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.3.name: Brave
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.4.entries.0: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.4.name: Halfling Nimbleness
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.5.entries.0: You can speak, read, and write Common and Halfling. The Halfling language isn't secret, but halflings are loath to share it with others. They write very little, so they don't have a rich body of literature. Their oral tradition, however, is very strong. Almost all halflings speak Common to converse with the people in whose lands they dwell or through which they are traveling.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.5.name: Языки
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.6.entries.0: You know the {@spell druidcraft} cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the {@spell entangle} spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. When you reach 5th level, you can cast the {@spell spike growth} spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Casting these spells with this trait doesn't require material components. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for these spells.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.6.name: Child of the Wood
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.7.entries.0: Ability checks made to track you have disadvantage, and you can move across {@quickref difficult terrain||3} made of nonmagical plants and undergrowth without expending extra movement.
Halfling (Lotusden).entries.7.name: Timberwalk
Halfling (Lotusden).name: Halfling (Lotusden)
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.0: Over the centuries in which humankind proved an unstoppable force in conquering Etharis, humans earned the enmity of most other folk. All who tried to oppose them were met with violence. One group, however, chose not to contest human ascendancy and instead survived by adapting to human hegemony.
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.1: The Era of Expansion did not affect the halflings of Etharis as it did the folk of other heritages. Halflings hold less value for mundane riches like gold or jewels and were therefore happy paying tithes to stronger and better-armed humans who offered them protection. Though brave and spirited, halflings lack the ambition for nation building. Their humble shires easily adapted to becoming breadbaskets for human-made empires and kingdoms. Halflings also fit into human culture perfectly by acquiring useful positions such as merchants, advisors, teachers, or scholars. Even though the halflings did not agree with the violent ways of humans, they kept their silence and ensured their survival.
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.2: Halflings are a resilient but peaceful people. What most of these tiny folk seek in life is a quiet place to settle, far away from conflict and war. They enjoy good music, fine food, and a good laugh when they can, and have a passion for lore, learning, and wild tales. But this does not mean that halflings are unable to fend for themselves in a dangerous world. They're courageous folk when standing against foes they cannot elude or escape, and accounts of halfling adventurers seeking ancient and hidden knowledge are some of the most famous stories among their kind.
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.3: Halflings have long used the lore they gather to build impressive libraries on specific subjects. Within the countless volumes of these libraries lie generations of knowledge pertaining to the interests and passions of these folk, including domestic crafts, nature, and history.
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.4.entries.0: К распространённым наследиям Этариса относятся люди, что ныне правят континентом, и народы старших рас, вынужденные мириться с новой жизнью на землях, которыми они некогда правили или владели.
Halfling GHPG24._fluffText.4.name: Распространённые наследия
Halfling GHPG24.entries.0.items.0.entrie: A Halfling reaches adulthood at the age of 20 and generally lives into the middle of their second century.
Halfling GHPG24.entries.0.items.0.name: Возраст:
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.entries.0: Many Halflings possess innate instincts of courage and curiosity, even if only a few get the chance to use them.
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.entries.1.name: Боевые черты:
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.entries.2.name: Исследовательские черты:
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.entries.3.entr: {@optfeature Artisanal Focus|GrimHollowPG24} ({@item Brewer's Supplies|XPHB}, {@item Cook's Utensils|XPHB}, or {@item Potter's Tools|XPHB})
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.entries.3.name: Ролевые черты:
Halfling GHPG24.entries.1.name: Traditional Halfling Traits
Halfling GHPG24.entries.2.entries.0.entr: Выбор традиционных черт, указанных для вашего наследия, — быстрый и простой способ создать персонажа, который ощущается как надёжный архетип в рамках выбранного наследия. Однако вы можете заменить любую из предложенных традиционных черт наследия на {@filter любую из доступных черт|optionalfeatures|source=GrimHollowPG24|feature type=HT}, собирая персонажа из любых восьми черт. Сюда входит возможность взять традиционные черты, представленные для любого другого наследия, взять одну из своих традиционных черт повторно, чтобы получить её вторичный эффект, или взять любую из множества черт, не входящих в стандартный набор какого-либо наследия.
Halfling GHPG24.entries.2.entries.0.name: Выбор черт
Halfling GHPG24.name: Halfling
Cherished and guided by gods who value life, home, and hearth, halflings gravitate toward bucolic havens where family and community help shape their lives. That said, many halflings possess a brave and adventurous spirit that leads them on journeys of discovery, affording them the chance to explore a bigger world and make new friends along the way. Their size—similar to that of a human child—helps them pass through crowds unnoticed and slip through tight spaces.

Anyone who has spent time around halflings, particularly halfling adventurers, has likely witnessed the storied "luck of the halflings" in action. When a halfling is in mortal danger, an unseen force seems to intervene on the halfling's behalf. Many halflings believe in the power of luck, and they attribute their unusual gift to one or more of their benevolent gods, including Yondalla, Brandobaris, and Charmalaine. The same gift might contribute to their robust life spans (about 150 years).

Halfling communities come in all varieties. For every sequestered shire tucked away in an unspoiled part of the world, there's a crime syndicate like the Boromar Clan in the Eberron setting or a territorial mob of halflings like those in the Dark Sun setting.

Halflings who prefer to live underground are sometimes called strongheart halflings or stouts. Nomadic halflings, as well as those who live among humans and other tall folk, are sometimes called lightfoot halflings or tallfellows.
Halfling.entries.0.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws you make to avoid or end the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition.
Halfling.entries.0.name: Brave
Halfling.entries.1.entries.0: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.
Halfling.entries.1.name: Halfling Nimbleness
Halfling.entries.2.entries.0: When you roll a 1 on the {@dice d20} of a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.
Halfling.entries.2.name: Luck
Halfling.entries.3.entries.0: You can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.
Halfling.entries.3.name: Naturally Stealthy
Halfling.name: Halfling
Harengon._fluffText.0: Harengons originated in the Feywild, where they spoke Sylvan and embodied the spirit of freedom and travel. In time, these rabbitfolk hopped into other worlds, bringing the fey realm's exuberance with them and learning new languages as they went.
Harengon._fluffText.1: Harengons are bipedal, with the characteristic long feet of the rabbits they resemble and fur in a variety of colors. They share the keen senses and powerful legs of leporine creatures and are full of energy, like a wound-up spring. Harengons are blessed with a little fey luck, and they often find themselves a few fortunate feet away from dangers during adventures.
Harengon.entries.0.entries.0: Вы Среднего или Маленького размера. Вы выбираете размер при выборе этой расы.
Harengon.entries.0.name: Размер
Harengon.entries.1.entries.0: You can add your proficiency bonus to your initiative rolls.
Harengon.entries.1.name: Hare-Trigger
Harengon.entries.2.name: Leporine Senses
Harengon.entries.3.entries.0: When you fail a Dexterity saving throw, you can use your reaction to roll a {@dice d4} and add it to the save, potentially turning the failure into a success. You can't use this reaction if you're {@condition prone} or your speed is 0.
Harengon.entries.3.name: Lucky Footwork
Harengon.entries.4.entries.0: As a bonus action, you can jump a number of feet equal to five times your proficiency bonus, without provoking opportunity attacks. You can use this trait only if your speed is greater than 0. You can use it a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Harengon.entries.4.name: Rabbit Hop
Harengon.entries.5.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Harengon.entries.5.name: Языки
Harengon.name: Harengon
Hexblood._fluffText.0: Where wishing fails, ancient magic can offer a heart's desire—at least, for a time. Hexbloods are individuals infused with eldritch magic, fey energy, or mysterious witchcraft. Some who enter into bargains with hags gain their deepest wishes but eventually find themselves transformed. These changes evidence a hag's influence: ears that split in forked points, skin in lurid shades, long hair that regrows if cut, and an irremovable living crown. Along with these marks, hexbloods manifest hag-like traits, such as {@sense darkvision} and a variety of magical methods to beguile the senses and avoid the same.
Hexblood._fluffText.1: While many hexbloods gain their lineage after making a deal with a hag, others reveal their nature as they age—particularly if a hag influenced them early in life or even before their birth. Many hexbloods turn to lives of adventure, seeking to discover the mysteries of their magic, to forge a connection with their fey natures, or to avoid a hag that obsesses over them.
Hexblood._fluffText.2.entries.0: One way hags create more of their kind is through the creation of hexbloods. Every hexblood exhibits features suggestive of the hag whose magic inspires their powers. This includes an unusual crown, often called an eldercross or a witch's turn. This living, garland-like part of a hexblood's body extends from their temples and wraps behind the head, serving as a visible mark of the bargain between hag and hexblood, a debt owed, or a change to come.
Hexblood._fluffText.2.name: Heir of Hags
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.0: A bargain with a hag or other eerie forces transformed your character into a magical being. Roll on or choose an option from the Hexblood Origins table to determine how your character gained their lineage.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.caption: Hexblood Origins
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.0.1: Seeking a child, your parent made a bargain with a hag. You are the result of that arrangement.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.1.1: Fey kidnappers swapped you and your parents' child.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.2.1: A coven of hags lost one of its members. You were created to replace the lost hag.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.3.1: You were cursed as a child. A deal with the spirits of the forest transformed you into a hexblood, now free of the curse.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.4.1: You began life as a fey creature, but an accident changed you and forced you from your home.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.entries.1.rows.5.1: A slighted druid transformed you and bound you to live only so long as a sacred tree bears fruit.
Hexblood._fluffText.3.name: Hexblood Origins
Hexblood.entries.0.name: Тип существа
Hexblood.entries.1.entries.0: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you gain this lineage.
Hexblood.entries.1.name: Размер
Hexblood.entries.2.entries.0: If you replace a race with this lineage, you can keep the following elements of that race: any skill proficiencies you gained from it and any climbing, flying, or swimming speed you gained from it.
Hexblood.entries.2.entries.1: If you don't keep any of those elements or you choose this lineage at character creation, you gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.
Hexblood.entries.2.name: Ancestral Legacy
Hexblood.entries.3.entries.0: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness as shades of gray.
Hexblood.entries.3.name: Тёмное зрение
Hexblood.entries.4.entries.0: As a bonus action, you can harmlessly remove a lock of your hair, one of your nails, or one of your teeth. This token is imbued with magic until you finish a long rest. While the token is imbued in this way, you can take these actions:
Hexblood.entries.4.entries.1.items.0.ent: As an action, you can send a telepathic message to the creature holding or carrying the token, as long as you are within 10 miles of it. The message can contain up to twenty-five words.
Hexblood.entries.4.entries.1.items.1.ent: If you are within 10 miles of the token, you can enter a trance as an action. The trance lasts for 1 minute, but it ends early if you dismiss it (no action required) or are {@condition incapacitated}. During this trance, you can see and hear from the token as if you were located where it is. While you are using your senses at the token's location, you are {@condition blinded} and {@condition deafened} in regard to your own surroundings. When the trance ends, the token is harmlessly destroyed.
Hexblood.entries.4.entries.2: Once you create a token using this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a long rest, at which point your missing part regrows.
Hexblood.entries.4.name: Eerie Token
Hexblood.entries.5.entries.0: You can cast the {@spell disguise self} and {@spell hex} spells with this trait. Once you cast either of these spells with this trait, you can't cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have.
Hexblood.entries.5.entries.1: Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells (choose the ability when you gain this lineage).
Hexblood.entries.5.entries.2.entries.0: Hags can undertake a ritual to irreversibly transform a hexblood they created into a new hag, either one of their own kind or that embodies the hexblood's nature. This requires that both the hag and hexblood be in the same place and consent to the lengthy ritual—circumstances most hexbloods shun but might come to accept over the course of centuries. Once a hexblood undergoes this irreversible ritual, they emerge as a hag NPC no longer under the control of the hexblood's player, unless the DM rules otherwise.
Hexblood.entries.5.entries.2.name: Становление Ягой
Hexblood.entries.5.name: Hex Magic
Hexblood.entries.6.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Hexblood.entries.6.name: Языки
Hexblood.name: Hexblood
Hobgoblin._fluffText.0: Hobgoblins trace their origins to the ancient courts of the Feywild, where they first appeared with their goblin and bugbear kin. Many of them were driven from the Feywild by the conquering god Maglubiyet, who marshaled them as soldiers, but the fey realm left its mark; wherever they are in the multiverse, they continue to channel an aspect of the Feywild's rule of reciprocity, which creates a mystical bond between the giver and the receiver of a gift.
Hobgoblin._fluffText.1: On some worlds, such bonds lead hobgoblins to form communities with deep ties to one another. In Eberron and the Forgotten Realms, vast hobgoblin legions have emerged, with ranks of devoted soldiers famed for their unity.
Hobgoblin._fluffText.2: Hobgoblins are generally taller than their goblin cousins but not quite as big as bugbears. They have curved, pointed ears and noses that turn bright red or blue during displays of emotion.
Hobgoblin.entries.0.entries.0: Вы — гуманоид. Вы также считаетесь гоблиноидом для любого требования или эффекта, для которого нужно быть гоблиноидом.
Hobgoblin.entries.0.name: Тип существа
Hobgoblin.entries.1.entries.0: Вы можете видеть в тусклом свете в пределах 60 футов от вас, как если бы это был яркий свет, и в темноте — как если бы это был тусклый свет. В этой темноте вы различаете цвета лишь как оттенки серого.
Hobgoblin.entries.1.name: Тёмное зрение
Hobgoblin.entries.2.entries.0: Вы совершаете с преимуществом спасброски, которые делаете, чтобы избежать состояния {@condition charmed|XPHB|Очарованный} или прекратить его действие на себе.
Hobgoblin.entries.2.name: Наследие фей
Hobgoblin.entries.3.entries.0: You can use this trait to take the {@action Help} action as a bonus action, and you can do so a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus. You regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Hobgoblin.entries.3.entries.1: Starting at 3rd level, choose one of the options below each time you take the {@action Help} action with this trait:
Hobgoblin.entries.3.entries.2.items.0.en: You and the creature you help each gain a number of temporary hit points equal to {@dice 1d6} plus your proficiency bonus.
Hobgoblin.entries.3.entries.2.items.1.en: You and the creature you help each increase your walking speeds by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
Hobgoblin.entries.3.entries.2.items.2.en: Until the start of your next turn, the first time the creature you help hits a target with an attack roll, that target has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes within the next minute.
Hobgoblin.entries.3.name: Fey Gift
Hobgoblin.entries.4.entries.0: If you miss with an attack roll or fail an ability check or a saving throw, you can draw on your bonds of reciprocity to gain a bonus to the roll equal to the number of allies you can see within 30 feet of you (maximum bonus of +3). You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Hobgoblin.entries.4.name: Fortune from the Many
Hobgoblin.entries.5.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Hobgoblin.entries.5.name: Языки
Hobgoblin.name: Hobgoblin
Human GHPG24._fluffText.0: While ancient heritages such as the elves and the dwarves claim to have raised the first kingdoms in Etharis, humans dominate those lands in the current age. Humans can be found everywhere, from the frozen and inhospitable tundra of the North to the scorched plains of the South. First recorded emerging from temperate forests in the lands that are now the Bürach Empire, humans were not considered a threat by the dominant folk of the continent. Left unchecked, their numbers quickly grew. And in the end, the humans' adaptable nature and adventurous mindset led them to expand beyond their homelands.
Human GHPG24._fluffText.1: The period written in history as the Era of Expansion is often portrayed as an endless eruption of violence that lasted centuries as humans spread to every corner of Etharis. Rather, the Era of Expansion describes many separate conflicts that occurred in the wake of human migration. Humans didn't send armies initially, but settlers. They cut trees from the Grove Maze to build homes. They journeyed to the reaches of Valika to escape their own kingdoms in the south. When they claimed the lands already populated by other folk, war became inevitable. By the time the great kingdoms of the elves and dwarves recognized the danger of human migration, it was already too late. The bloodshed that followed changed Etharis forever.
Human GHPG24._fluffText.2: The success of humans is owed to their adaptability. They live shorter lives than many other peoples, causing their cultural customs to fade quicker and preventing them from becoming stifled by their own traditions. Every human culture has been touched by another heritage in the lands they've come to settle. In the duchies of the Charneault Kingdom, humans pay homage to the Spirits of Nature as taught to them by the elves. The modern fortresses and cities in the Bürach Empire incorporate dwarven stonework and architecture. To this day, humans are considered the dominant folk across all Etharis, controlling most of the land and sea. But their realms are far from homogeneous, each with their own history and mix of folk from other heritages.
Human GHPG24._fluffText.3: Of all human vices, ambition is thought to be the most insidious. Humans still dominate positions of power within their societies. Many have asserted their claim to the High Throne of Altenheim, wishing to control the most powerful empire in the world. Known as the Era of Descent, the years that followed the Era of Expansion have been witness to the decline of each human domain. While many commoners believe it to be the death of the gods that began this downfall, folk of other heritages whisper that it was human hubris. When there were no more realms to conquer, humanity turned their greed, ambition, and violence upon themselves.
Human GHPG24._fluffText.4.entries.0: К распространённым наследиям Этариса относятся люди, что ныне правят континентом, и народы старших рас, вынужденные мириться с новой жизнью на землях, которыми они некогда правили или владели.
Human GHPG24._fluffText.4.name: Распространённые наследия
Human GHPG24.entries.0.items.0.entries.0: Humans reach adulthood in their late teens and live less than a century.
Human GHPG24.entries.0.items.0.name: Возраст:
Human GHPG24.entries.1.entries.0: Though Humans are no more drawn to violence than any other folk, many possess an innate ambition, a hunger for exploration, and a willingness to stand against danger.
Human GHPG24.entries.1.entries.1.name: Боевые черты:
Human GHPG24.entries.1.entries.2.name: Исследовательские черты:
Human GHPG24.entries.1.entries.3.name: Ролевые черты:
Human GHPG24.entries.1.name: Traditional Human Traits
Human GHPG24.entries.2.entries.0.entries: Выбор традиционных черт, указанных для вашего наследия, — быстрый и простой способ создать персонажа, который ощущается как надёжный архетип в рамках выбранного наследия. Однако вы можете заменить любую из предложенных традиционных черт наследия на {@filter любую из доступных черт|optionalfeatures|source=GrimHollowPG24|feature type=HT}, собирая персонажа из любых восьми черт. Сюда входит возможность взять традиционные черты, представленные для любого другого наследия, взять одну из своих традиционных черт повторно, чтобы получить её вторичный эффект, или взять любую из множества черт, не входящих в стандартный набор какого-либо наследия.
Human GHPG24.entries.2.entries.0.name: Выбор черт
Human GHPG24.name: Человек
Human._fluffText.0.entries.0.entries.0: Встречающиеся по всей мультивселенной люди столь же разнообразны, сколь и многочисленны, и они стремятся достичь как можно большего за отведенные им годы жизни. Их честолюбие и находчивость вызывают похвалу, уважение и ужас во многих мирах.
Human._fluffText.0.entries.0.entries.1: Люди так же разнообразны внешне, как и жители Земли, и у них много богов. Ученые спорят о происхождении человечества, но считается, что одно из самых ранних известных собраний людей произошло в Сигиле, городе в форме тороида в центре мультивселенной, в месте, где родился Общий язык. Возможно, оттуда люди распространились по всей мультивселенной, неся с собой космополитизм Города Дверей.
Human.entries.0.entries.0: Вы получаете {@variantrule Heroic Inspiration|XPHB|Героическое вдохновение} каждый раз, когда завершаете {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Долгий отдых}.
Human.entries.0.name: Находчивый
Human.entries.1.entries.0: Вы получаете владение одним навыком на ваш выбор.
Human.entries.1.name: Умелый
Human.entries.2.entries.0: You gain an {@filter Origin feat|feats|category=o} of your choice.
Human.entries.2.name: Гибкий
Human.name: Человек
Kalashtar._fluffText.0: Kalashtar (pronounced kal-ASH-tar) are created from the union of humanity and renegade spirits called quori from the plane of dreams. Kalashtar appear human, but their spiritual connection affects them in a variety of ways. They have symmetrical, slightly angular features, and their eyes often glow when they are concentrating or expressing strong emotions.
Kalashtar._fluffText.1: Kalashtar can't communicate directly with their quori spirits. Rather, kalashtar might experience them as a source of instinct and inspiration, drawing on the spirits' memories when the kalashtar sleep. This connection grants kalashtar minor psionic abilities, as well as protection from psionic attacks.
Kalashtar.entries.0.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.
Kalashtar.entries.0.name: Dual Mind
Kalashtar.entries.1.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Psychic damage.
Kalashtar.entries.1.name: Ментальная дисциплина
Kalashtar.entries.2.entries.0: You have telepathy with a range in feet equal to 10 times your level. When you're using this trait to speak telepathically to a creature, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to give that creature the ability to speak telepathically with you for 1 hour or until you take another {@action Magic|XPHB} action to end this effect.
Kalashtar.entries.2.name: Mind Link
Kalashtar.entries.3.entries.0: You can't be the target of the {@spell Dream|XPHB} spell. In addition, when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you gain proficiency in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you finish another {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Kalashtar.entries.3.name: Severed from Dreams
Kalashtar.name: Kalashtar
Kender._fluffText.0: During the mythical origins of Krynn, Reorx, god of craft, indulged in an age of unfettered creation. Many peoples sprang from his divine forge, but not all among them remained as the god created them. Altered by unbridled magic, a group of gnomes were transformed and given almost supernatural curiosity and fearlessness. These were the first kender.
Kender._fluffText.1: Originating on the world of Krynn, kender are diminutive Humanoids who look like humans with pointed ears and diverse appearances. Kender have a supernatural curiosity that drives them to adventure. Due to this inquisitiveness, many kender find themselves falling through portals to other planes and worlds.
Kender._fluffText.2: Kender sometimes amass impressive collections of curiosities. Some might collect mundane knickknacks or relics from magical sites, while others might become professional thieves.
Kender.entries.0.entries.0: You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the {@condition frightened} condition on yourself. When you fail a saving throw to avoid or end the {@condition frightened} condition on yourself, you can choose to succeed instead. Once you succeed on a saving throw in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a long rest.
Kender.entries.0.name: Fearless
Kender.entries.1.entries.0: Thanks to the mystical origin of your people, you gain proficiency with one of the following skills of your choice: {@skill Insight}, {@skill Investigation}, {@skill Sleight of Hand}, {@skill Stealth}, or {@skill Survival}.
Kender.entries.1.name: Kender Curiosity
Kender.entries.2.entries.0: You have an extraordinary ability to fluster creatures. As a bonus action, you can unleash a string of provoking words at a creature within 60 feet of yourself that can hear and understand you. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw, or it has disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you until the start of your next turn. The DC equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifier (choose when you select this race).
Kender.entries.2.entries.1: You can use this bonus action a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Kender.entries.2.name: Taunt
Kender.entries.3.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Kender.entries.3.name: Языки
Kender.name: Kender
Kenku._fluffText.0: Feathered folk who resemble ravens, kenku are blessed with keen observation and supernaturally accurate memories. None of them can remember the origin of the first kenku, however, and they often joke that there are as many kenku origin stories as there are kenku. Some of them paint their genesis as a curse, being a flightless bird people doomed to mimic other people's creations. Other kenku recite cryptic but beautiful poems about their advent being a blessed event in which they were sent into the multiverse to observe and catalog its many wonders.
Kenku._fluffText.1: Whatever their true origin, kenku are most often found in the Shadowfell and the Material Plane, and they tend to have the coloration typical of ravens.
Kenku.entries.0.entries.0: Your size is Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.
Kenku.entries.0.name: Размер
Kenku.entries.1.entries.0: When you copy writing or craftwork produced by yourself or someone else, you have advantage on any ability checks you make to produce an exact duplicate.
Kenku.entries.1.name: Expert Duplication
Kenku.entries.2.entries.0: Thanks to your supernaturally good memory, you have proficiency in two skills of your choice.
Kenku.entries.2.entries.1: Moreover, when you make an ability check using any skill in which you have proficiency, you can give yourself advantage on the check before rolling the {@dice d20}. You can give yourself advantage in this way a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Kenku.entries.2.name: Kenku Recall
Kenku.entries.3.entries.0: You can accurately mimic sounds you have heard, including voices. A creature that hears the sounds you make can tell they are imitations only with a successful Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check against a DC of 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier.
Kenku.entries.3.name: Mimicry
Kenku.entries.4.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Kenku.entries.4.name: Языки
Kenku.name: Kenku
Khoravar._fluffText.0: Over the course of centuries, those descended from both humans and elves have developed their own communities and traditions in Khorvaire. The rise of House Lyrandar and House Medani has strengthened this identity. Members of these communities call themselves Khoravar, an Elvish term meaning "children of Khorvaire," as they dislike the term "half-elf."
Khoravar._fluffText.1: Many Khoravar espouse the idea of being "the bridge between," believing they are called to facilitate communication and cooperation between members of different cultures or species. Khoravar who follow this philosophy often become bards, diplomats, mediators, or translators. Others, fascinated by their distant connection to the Fey, seek to build bridges between the Material Plane and the Feywild of Thelanis. These Khoravar often become druids or warlocks with archfey patrons.
Khoravar.entries.0.entries.0: У вас есть {@sense Darkvision|XPHB|Тёмное зрение} дальностью 60 футов.
Khoravar.entries.0.name: Тёмное зрение
Khoravar.entries.1.entries.0: Вы совершаете с {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB|Преимуществом} спасброски на избежание или окончание состояния {@condition Charmed|XPHB|Очарованный}.
Khoravar.entries.1.name: Наследие фей
Khoravar.entries.2.entries.0: You know the {@spell Friends|XPHB} cantrip. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can replace that cantrip with a different cantrip from the Cleric, Druid, or Wizard spell list. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it (choose the ability when you select this species).
Khoravar.entries.2.name: Fey Gift
Khoravar.entries.3.entries.0: When you fail a saving throw to avoid or end the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition, you can succeed instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish {@dice 1d4} {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB|Long Rests}.
Khoravar.entries.3.name: Lethargy Resilience
Khoravar.entries.4.entries.0: You gain proficiency in one skill or with one tool of your choice. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can replace it with another skill or tool proficiency.
Khoravar.entries.4.name: Skill Versatility
Khoravar.name: Khoravar
Kithkin._fluffText.0: Kithkin are short folk with stout legs, long arms, and sturdy torsos. Their broad faces; round ears; and large, expressive eyes lend them a vaguely ursine appearance.
Kithkin._fluffText.1: Most kithkin are linked by an empathic web that lets them sense the feelings of nearby kithkin. Because of this connection, many kithkin trust each other implicitly.
Kithkin._fluffText.2: Some kithkin remove themselves from this empathic web temporarily or even permanently for a variety of reasons, often due to trauma suffered during the Phyrexian invasion (see {@book "Lorwyn-Shadowmoor's History"|LFL|0|Lorwyn-Shadowmoor's History}). Regardless, kithkin typically believe that betraying their own is a heinous crime.
Kithkin._fluffText.3.entries.0: Lorwyn kithkin live in pastoral villages called clachans and welcome outsiders into their communities. These kithkin collect their cultural heritage in a tome called the {@i Book of Kith and Kin}. They also often entertain many superstitions, particularly related to Lorwyn's {@filter incarnations of nature|bestiary|source=LFL|search=incarnation of nature}.
Kithkin._fluffText.3.name: В Лорвине
Kithkin._fluffText.4.entries.0: Shadowmoor kithkin are more insular and xenophobic. They mostly live in fortified settlements called douns, where strict customs to preserve the social order. Shadowmoor kithkin leaders keep a close eye on their communities, monitoring for any sign of crime or treason.
Kithkin._fluffText.4.name: В Шэдоумуре
Kithkin.entries.0.entries.0: You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws you make to avoid or end the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition.
Kithkin.entries.0.name: Brave
Kithkin.entries.1.entries.0: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, but you can't stop in the same space.
Kithkin.entries.1.name: Halfling Nimbleness
Kithkin.entries.2.entries.0: When you roll a 1 on the {@dice d20} of a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.
Kithkin.entries.2.name: Luck
Kithkin.entries.3.entries.0: You can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.
Kithkin.entries.3.name: Naturally Stealthy
Kithkin.entries.4.entries.0: Как уроженец Лорвина либо Шэдоумура, вы можете получить дополнительные черты.
Kithkin.entries.4.entries.1.items.0.entr: Вы не получаете никаких дополнительных черт.
Kithkin.entries.4.entries.1.items.0.name: Лорвин
Kithkin.entries.4.entries.1.items.1.entr: У вас есть {@sense Darkvision|XPHB|Тёмное зрение} дальностью 120 футов.
Kithkin.entries.4.entries.1.items.1.name: Шэдоумур
Kithkin.entries.4.name: Kithkin Lineage
Kithkin.name: Kithkin
Kobold._fluffText.0: Some of the smallest draconic creatures in the multiverse, kobolds display their draconic ancestry in the glint of their scales and in their roars. Legends tell of the first kobolds emerging from the Underdark near the lairs of the earliest dragons. In some lands, kobolds serve chromatic or metallic dragons—even worshiping them as divine beings. In other places, kobolds know too well how dangerous those dragons can be and help others defend against draconic destruction.
Kobold._fluffText.1: Whatever their relationship to dragons, kobold scales tend to be rust colored, although the occasional kobold sports a scale color more akin to that of a chromatic or a metallic dragon. A kobold's cry can express a range of emotion: anger, resolve, elation, fear, and more. Regardless of the emotion expressed, their cry resonates with draconic power.
Kobold.entries.0.entries.0: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were in dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.
Kobold.entries.0.name: Тёмное зрение
Kobold.entries.1.entries.0: As a bonus action, you let out a cry at your enemies within 10 feet of you. Until the start of your next turn, you and your allies have advantage on attack rolls against any of those enemies who could hear you. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Kobold.entries.1.name: Draconic Cry
Kobold.entries.2.entries.0: Kobold's connections to dragons can manifest in unpredictable ways in an individual kobold. Choose one of the following legacy options for your kobold.
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.0.entry: You have proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: {@skill Arcana}, {@skill Investigation}, {@skill Medicine}, {@skill Sleight of Hand}, or {@skill Survival}.
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.0.name: Craftiness
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.1.entry: You have advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition frightened} condition on yourself.
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.1.name: Defiance
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.2.entry: You know one {@filter cantrip of your choice from the sorcerer spell list|spells|level=0|class=Sorcerer}. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for that cantrip (choose when you select this race).
Kobold.entries.2.entries.1.items.2.name: Draconic Sorcery
Kobold.entries.2.name: Kobold Legacy
Kobold.entries.3.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Kobold.entries.3.name: Языки
Kobold.name: Kobold
Laneshi._fluffText.0: Deep beneath the waves off the eastern shores of Etharis lies the Llana'Shi Empire, home to the mysterious people called the laneshi by surface dwellers. Appearing incredibly alien to other common folk, these pale humanoids with manes of kelp-like hair are creatures of the sea, able to converse with the flora and fauna of the depths. Laneshi dwell within a culture that views the world in terms of absolutes and a sense of underlying duality. Day or night. Acceptance or rejection. Friend or foe. Their culture is also entwined along the line between life and death. They commune with spirits for guidance and are unafraid to meet their mortal demise. All things must have their place in laneshi society, which is built on a rigid caste system reflecting this view.
Laneshi._fluffText.1: The mystic caste comprises all laneshi born as twins, a common occurrence among their people. The first-born twin is always inducted into the mystic caste, while the other is consecrated as their sibling's spirit guide. Using a powerful necromantic ritual, the second twin is sacrificed, its soul bound within the body of the other. Each member of the mystic caste is therefore possessed of two souls—one living and one dead—which grants them vision into the spirit world and heightens their necromantic abilities. Mystics oversee funeral rites, crafting, construction, recordkeeping, and food preparation. The heavier duties of members from this caste are even performed with the aid of undead labor—a nightmarish vision for surface-dwelling folk.
Laneshi._fluffText.2: The warrior caste of the laneshi oversee not just warfare but diplomacy, farming, and the raising and educating of children. The warrior caste is roughly double the size of the mystic caste, structured as a meritocracy, with great deeds leading to greater status.
Laneshi._fluffText.3: Laneshi warriors skirmish constantly with their deep-dwelling neighbors. But at the same time, the rulers of the Llana'Shi Empire have begun to focus on the surface world for unknown reasons. Perhaps some new and greater threat stirs in the dark depths of the sea, and the laneshi seek aid from their air-breathing cousins. Or perhaps there's truth in the fearful whispers that these aquatic visitors have wrought blasphemous pacts with ancient evils, and the laneshi search for new lands to conquer to appease the hunger of an unnamable master.
Laneshi._fluffText.4.entries.0: Жуткие наследия Grim Hollow охватывают самых разных существ, сформированных магическим умыслом, противоестественной силой или прикосновением древних проклятий. Почти неизменно представители этих наследий обречены в одиночку прокладывать свой путь по неспокойному и опасному миру.
Laneshi._fluffText.4.name: Редкие наследия
Laneshi.entries.0.items.0.entries.0: Laneshi mature quickly, reaching adulthood at around 14, and can live up to 150 years.
Laneshi.entries.0.items.0.name: Возраст:
Laneshi.entries.1.entries.0: Their unique undersea culture shapes the talents and drives of many Laneshi.
Laneshi.entries.1.entries.1.name: Боевые черты:
Laneshi.entries.1.entries.2.name: Исследовательские черты:
Laneshi.entries.1.entries.3.name: Ролевые черты:
Laneshi.entries.1.name: Traditional Laneshi Traits
Laneshi.entries.2.entries.0.entries.0: Выбор традиционных черт, указанных для вашего наследия, — быстрый и простой способ создать персонажа, который ощущается как надёжный архетип в рамках выбранного наследия. Однако вы можете заменить любую из предложенных традиционных черт наследия на {@filter любую из доступных черт|optionalfeatures|source=GrimHollowPG24|feature type=HT}, собирая персонажа из любых восьми черт. Сюда входит возможность взять традиционные черты, представленные для любого другого наследия, взять одну из своих традиционных черт повторно, чтобы получить её вторичный эффект, или взять любую из множества черт, не входящих в стандартный набор какого-либо наследия.
Laneshi.entries.2.entries.0.name: Выбор черт
Laneshi.name: Laneshi
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.0: The leonin guard the shining lands of Oreskos, a golden plain where even the gods rarely trespass. Prides of these nomadic, lion-like humanoids rarely interact with other peoples, having all they need in their shimmering homeland and knowing the treachery of strangers. Still, some leonin wonder what lies beyond Oreskos's border mountains and seek to test themselves in a wider world.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.1.entries.0: Leonin tend to be tall compared to humans and move with a boldness that suggests their physical might. Tawny fur covers leonin bodies, and some grow thick manes ranging in shades from gold to black. While their hands prove as nimble as those of other humanoids, leonin have retractable feline claws, which they can extend instantly. This, along with their ability to produce bone-shaking roars, gives most leonin an air that readily shifts between regal and fearsome.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.1.entries.1: Leonin often act with confidence, which can come off as imperiousness. While this can reassure their allies, it can also suggest defiance in the face of what they perceive as imposed authority or unworthy experts.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.1.name: Noble and Fierce
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.2.entries.0: Other peoples often perceive leonin as quick to take offense, intolerant of criticism, or belligerent. The truth is that many leonin simply enjoy fighting, whether verbal or physical. They take pleasure in argument, wrestling, sparring, and even battle, enjoying the opportunity to exercise their minds and bodies.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.2.entries.1: It follows, too, that leonin aren't inclined to carry grudges. A warrior might react with sudden violence to an insult, but when the fight is over (and the leonin's superiority proven), the insult is forgotten—along with the vanquished foe.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.2.name: Quick to Quarrel
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.3.entries.0: Few leonin devote themselves to the service of the gods. Centuries ago, the leonin worshiped the same gods that humans do, but after many of their prides suffered depravities at the hands of the tyrant Agnomakhos, most leonin rejected the gods. It's not that they deny the existence of deities; they merely see the gods as mercurial and ultimately unworthy of adoration. The Leonin and the Gods table suggests the range of attitudes that leonin might adopt toward the gods.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.3.entries.1: Leonin rely on themselves and their prides. A pride is bound together by the experience of a shared challenge and, in particular, the sacred act of the hunt. See {@book chapter 3|MOT|3|Oreskos} for more details on Oreskos and the leonin who call that land home.
I'm amused by the antics of the gods and their earnest, but ultimately deluded, mortal champions, and I feel smugly superior in my detachment.
The meddling of the gods in mortal affairs makes me angry and bitter. I wish they would just leave us all alone!
I view the gods as worthy adversaries—incredibly clever and well-prepared to play a long game but ultimately doomed to lose their games.
I'm certain every bad thing that happens can ultimately be blamed on the gods, but I roll my eyes at each new twist of fate and try to get on with my life.
I wish that I could be as naive as humans and other mortals who actually think the gods are looking out for them. I miss that kind of innocence.
I don't talk about it among other leonin, but I actually revere the gods and try to please them by my actions.
Leonin._fluffText.0.entries.3.name: Pride and Self-Reliance
Leonin.entries.0.entries.0: Leonin mature and age at about the same rate as humans.
Leonin.entries.0.name: Возраст
Leonin.entries.1.entries.0: Leonin tend toward good alignments. Leonin who are focused on the pride lean toward lawful good.
Leonin.entries.1.name: Мировоззрение
Leonin.entries.2.entries.0: Leonin are typically over 6 feet tall, with some standing over 7 feet. Your size is Medium.
Leonin.entries.2.name: Размер
Leonin.entries.3.entries.0: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.
Leonin.entries.3.name: Тёмное зрение
Leonin.entries.4.entries.0: Your claws are natural weapons, which you can use to make unarmed strikes. If you hit with them, you can deal slashing damage equal to {@damage 1d4} + your Strength modifier, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.
Leonin.entries.4.name: Claws
Leonin.entries.5.entries.0: You have proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: {@skill Athletics}, {@skill Intimidation}, {@skill Perception}, or {@skill Survival}.
Leonin.entries.5.name: Hunter's Instincts
Leonin.entries.6.entries.0: As a bonus action, you can let out an especially menacing roar. Creatures of your choice within 10 feet of you that can hear you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become {@condition frightened} of you until the end of your next turn. The DC of the save equals 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Constitution modifier. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
Leonin.entries.6.name: Daunting Roar
Leonin.entries.7.entries.0: You can speak, read, and write Common and Leonin.
Leonin.entries.7.name: Языки
Leonin.name: Leonin
Lizardfolk._fluffText.0: The saurian lizardfolk are thought by some sages to be distant cousins of dragonborn and kobolds. Despite their resemblance to those other scaled folk, however, lizardfolk are their own people and have lived on the worlds of the Material Plane since the worlds' creation. Gifted by the gods with remarkable physical defenses and a mystical connection to the natural world, lizardfolk can survive with just their wits in situations that would be deadly for other folk. Because of that fact, many lizardfolk myths state that their people were placed by the gods in the Material Plane to guard its natural wonders.
Lizardfolk._fluffText.1: Lizardfolk have colorful scales and exhibit a wide array of scale patterns. Their individual facial features are as varied as those of lizards.
Lizardfolk.entries.0.entries.0: Ваша скорость ходьбы составляет 30 футов, и у вас есть скорость плавания, равная вашей скорости ходьбы.
Lizardfolk.entries.0.name: Скорость
Lizardfolk.entries.1.entries.0: You have a fanged maw that you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with it, the strike deals {@damage 1d6} + your Strength modifier slashing damage, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.
Lizardfolk.entries.1.name: Bite
Lizardfolk.entries.2.entries.0: You can hold your breath for up to 15 minutes at a time.
Lizardfolk.entries.2.name: Hold Breath
Lizardfolk.entries.3.entries.0: You can throw yourself into a feeding frenzy. As a bonus action, you can make a special attack with your Bite. If the attack hits, it deals its normal damage, and you gain temporary hit points equal to your proficiency bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Lizardfolk.entries.3.name: Hungry Jaws
Lizardfolk.entries.4.entries.0: You have tough, scaly skin. When you aren't wearing armor, your base AC is 13 + Dexterity modifier. You can use your natural armor to determine your AC if the armor you wear would leave you with a lower AC. A shield's benefits apply as normal while you use your natural armor.
Lizardfolk.entries.4.name: Natural Armor
Lizardfolk.entries.5.entries.0: Thanks to your mystical connection to nature, you gain proficiency with two of the following skills of your choice: {@skill Animal Handling}, {@skill Medicine}, {@skill Nature}, {@skill Perception}, {@skill Stealth}, or {@skill Survival}.
Lizardfolk.entries.5.name: Nature's Intuition
Lizardfolk.entries.6.entries.0: Вы владеете устной и письменной речью на Общем и одном другом языке, который вы и ваш Мастер сочтёте подходящим для вашего персонажа.
Lizardfolk.entries.6.name: Языки
Lizardfolk.name: Lizardfolk
Lorwyn Changeling._fluffText.0: The changelings of Lorwyn are charismatic shapeshifters able to crudely mimic the forms of creatures and plants. Unlike most shapeshifters, however, their innate powers don't allow them to truly disguise themselves; rather, their transformations are purely surface level.
Lorwyn Changeling._fluffText.1: No matter their form, Lorwyn changelings keep their key traits: blue-green skin, tufts of tentacle-like fur, and bulbous yellow eyes with slitted pupils. The true changeling identity of a bug-eyed tree, teal elk, or furry boulder is always easy to spot. These counterfeits are so plain that many Lorwyn denizens find the effect inexplicably charming.
Lorwyn Changeling._fluffText.2: Changelings from Lorwyn live in a vast, mystical cave called Velis Vel Grotto (see chapter 2). Once per year, many changelings make a pilgrimage to the grotto to contemplate their past deeds.
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.0.entries.0: As an action, you can reshape your body to a two-legged Humanoid shape or to a four-legged Beast shape. While you have a Humanoid shape, you can wear clothing and armor made for a Humanoid of your size.
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.0.name: Shape Self
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.1.entries.0: У вас есть {@sense Darkvision|XPHB|Тёмное зрение} дальностью 120 футов.
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.1.name: Тёмное зрение
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.2.entries.0: You have proficiency in the {@skill Performance|XPHB} skill.
Lorwyn Changeling.entries.2.name: Delightful Imitator
